---
title: "Assignments"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello!!! My name is Şeyma Çeliker (seymaceliker).

Welcome to my personal webpage. Here you can follow my assignments, projects on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

*[GitHub](https://github.com/seymaceliker)
*[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/şeyma-çeliker-23080b24a)
*[Email](mailto:symaceliker@gmail.com)
